tooltip.earth_online_xuanhuan.block: Xuanhuan environment block: foundation for qi, alchemy, talismans and arrays.
tooltip.earth_online_xuanhuan.block.use: Right-click to read the local qi reaction. Handbook and GUI support will follow.
tooltip.earth_online_xuanhuan.material.r: First-version material: craftable and testable now, with richer processing later.
tooltip.earth_online_xuanhuan.spirit_com: Detects local qi concentration so new players can understand the resource layer.
Right-click: shows local qi grade and value.
tooltip.earth_online_xuanhuan.qi_guiding: Starter cultivation method: converts ambient qi into the shared mana value.
Right-click to practice. First use raises the qi-route mana cap; later uses restore mana.
tooltip.earth_online_xuanhuan.bigu_manua: Starter fasting method: does not delete hunger, but lowers food pressure and keeps a small buffer.
Right-click to practice. With Earth Human installed, this improves hunger pressure automatically.
tooltip.earth_online_xuanhuan.body_tempe: Starter body tempering: improves tolerance, fatigue recovery and temperature stress resistance.
Right-click to practice. With Earth Human installed, this improves fatigue, hydration and temperature pressure.
tooltip.earth_online_xuanhuan.fetal_brea: Starter inner breathing: uses qi to regulate breath rhythm and extend underwater air.
Right-click to practice. With Earth Human installed, this adds extra air capacity.
tooltip.earth_online_xuanhuan.spirit_spr: Portable spirit spring sample for alchemy, spirit soil and arrays.
tooltip.earth_online_xuanhuan.spirit_gra: A basic spirit plant produced when ordinary ecology is infused with qi.
tooltip.earth_online_xuanhuan.cinnabar_s: Talisman ink made from cinnabar-like pigment, ink and spiritual powder.
tooltip.earth_online_xuanhuan.talisman_p: A talisman carrier with clear material origins while keeping Minecraft crafting magic.
tooltip.earth_online_xuanhuan.basic_tali: A basic single-use talisman; effects will be expanded later.
tooltip.earth_online_xuanhuan.spirit_cry: Spiritual crystal shard for arrays, artifacts and furnace upgrades.
tooltip.earth_online_xuanhuan.spirit_iro: An artifact blank made by refining ordinary iron with qi.
tooltip.earth_online_xuanhuan.qi_recover: A starter pill used to test the alchemy route.
message.earth_online_xuanhuan.compass.hi: Hint: spirit veins, springs, soil and arrays raise qi. Repeated meditation can temporarily drain this chunk.
message.earth_online_xuanhuan.arcana.sta: Mana: %s/%s (qi route +%s, magic route +%s; both routes can be trained together and add up).
You understood the Qi Guiding Manual: ambient qi can now become shared mana.
You circulate the Qi Guiding Manual and reinforce the qi route.
You just meditated. Rest your breath for %s seconds. Pills recover instantly, crystals consume materials, and meditation drains local qi.
Qi source: %s; this chunk is now %s/45 depleted and will recover over time.
message.earth_online_xuanhuan.bigu_manua: You understood the Fasting Primer: qi now reduces hunger pressure.
You review the Fasting Primer and stabilize the fasting rhythm.
message.earth_online_xuanhuan.body_tempe: You understood Body Tempering: tolerance, fatigue recovery and temperature resistance improved.
You circulate Body Tempering and continue strengthening tolerance.
message.earth_online_xuanhuan.fetal_brea: You understood Inner Breath: underwater air and breathing capacity improved.
You review Inner Breath and stabilize your breathing rhythm.
message.earth_online_xuanhuan.cultivatio: Body adaptation: fasting %s, tempering +%s, extra air +%s ticks, endurance +%s.
message.earth_online_xuanhuan.block.spir: Spirit vein resonance: %s (%s/100). Underground, mountain and node areas will suit later spirit resources.
The spring stone feels clear and moist: %s (%s/100). Later it will supply spirit spring water for alchemy.
Spirit soil is nourishing plants: %s (%s/100). Later it will affect spirit crop growth.
message.earth_online_xuanhuan.block.alch: Alchemy furnace placed: %s (%s/100). It is a route marker now; GUI and processing come next.
message.earth_online_xuanhuan.block.tali: Talisman table opened: %s (%s/100). It crafts talismans now; a talisman UI comes next.
message.earth_online_xuanhuan.block.spir: Spirit array core located qi: %s (%s/100). Multiblock array checks come later.
message.earth_online_xuanhuan.block.fiel: Field reading: main source %s; chunk depletion %s/45.
